title: Fix off-by-one in window_slice end index
description: This patch fixes an off-by-one bug in list slicing where the end index was documented as inclusive but implemented as exclusive.
comments: alice: LGTM, nice catch! This was causing the pagination bug we saw in production last week.
bob: Thanks for fixing this, the off-by-one was tricky to spot.
ci-bot: unit tests passed (12/12), integration tests passed (5/5)
author: nina
